steps.title: Identify the paradox of visibility
steps.content: The passage states the sun is “already down,” yet is “manifest in the livid tongues of fire.” The sun has set below the horizon, yet somehow becomes evident through the dramatic light display.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the context
steps.content:
Perceptible means something that can be perceived or seen.

The sun, already below the horizon, becomes visible through the colorful fire-like light effects, so “manifest” must mean perceptible.

The other choices describe different properties—location, accomplishment, or fading—rather than visibility.

That confirms B is correct.
